data.change_summary: Added `milestone_id: &MilestoneId` parameter to `unique_terminal_replay_match` (fs.rs:2834) and replaced `file: "unique_terminal_replay_match".to_string()` with `file: format!("milestones/{}/task-runs.ndjson", milestone_id)` in the contract violation `AppError::CorruptRecord` error. Updated all three call sites to pass `milestone_id`: named-run terminal fallback (fs.rs:3145), fall-through from mismatched open runless row (fs.rs:3186), and runless terminal fallback (fs.rs:3298). The error's `file` field is now consistent with every other `CorruptRecord` in fs.rs, which all use `milestones/{id}/task-runs.ndjson` paths to help operators locate the problematic file.
outstanding_risks: Pre-existing flaky checkpoint_test::worktree_adapter_excludes_runtime_workspace_from_checkpoint_commits failure (missing directory in test environment) is unrelated to these changes.

steps.description: Added `milestone_id: &MilestoneId` parameter to `unique_terminal_replay_match` function signature at fs.rs:2829-2835
Changed `file: "unique_terminal_replay_match".to_string()` to `file: format!("milestones/{}/task-runs.ndjson", milestone_id)` in the contract violation CorruptRecord error at fs.rs:2841
Updated named-run terminal fallback call site at fs.rs:3140-3146 to pass `milestone_id`
Updated fall-through from mismatched open runless row call site at fs.rs:3181-3187 to pass `milestone_id`
Updated runless terminal fallback call site at fs.rs:3293-3299 to pass `milestone_id`
Ran cargo test --lib (360 passed, 0 failed), cargo clippy -- -D warnings (clean), cargo fmt --check (clean). Full test suite: 682 passed, 1 pre-existing flaky failure (checkpoint_test, unrelated).

validation_evidence: cargo test (full): 682 passed, 1 pre-existing failure (checkpoint_test::worktree_adapter_excludes_runtime_workspace_from_checkpoint_commits — missing directory, unrelated)
cargo clippy -- -D warnings: no warnings or errors
cargo fmt --check: all modified files clean
fs.rs:2834 reads: milestone_id: &MilestoneId, — parameter added to function signature
fs.rs:2841 reads: file: format!("milestones/{}/task-runs.ndjson", milestone_id), — consistent with all other CorruptRecord errors in fs.rs
fs.rs:3145 passes milestone_id to named-run terminal fallback call
fs.rs:3186 passes milestone_id to fall-through from mismatched open runless row call
fs.rs:3298 passes milestone_id to runless terminal fallback call

All prior round tests continue to pass: dispatch_v1_snapshot_v2_race_does_not_conflict, named_terminal_replay_succeeds_with_multiple_attempts, terminal_runless_replay_rejected_when_started_at_mismatches, terminal_replay_falls_through_past_mismatched_open_runless_row, runless_match_rejected_when_started_at_mismatches, terminal_replay_after_plan_evolution_succeeds, start_replay_after_plan_evolution_does_not_conflict, plan_hash_auto_populated_from_snapshot, explicit_plan_hash_takes_precedence_over_snapshot, runless_start_completed_with_named_run_id, completion_with_conflicting_plan_hash_rejects_runless_match, running_entry_created_before_plan_is_not_backfilled_on_revisit, safe_backfill_fills_plan_hash_when_snapshot_unchanged, safe_backfill_skips_when_snapshot_evolved, terminal_replay_legacy_row_without_plan_hash_stays_unset, terminal_replay_with_provenance_does_not_synthesize_plan_hash, start_journal_details_round_trips_with_model_render, completion_journal_details_round_trips_with_model_render, journal_merge_fills_all_optional_fields, merge_attempt_entries_fills_all_optional_fields
